languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

languages.text: "Хм. Не могу согласиться с этим суждением. На мой взгляд, Сектор Бионика стал выглядеть пристойнее. И кому может не нравиться чуть больше тишины?"
"Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

traits.locale_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

"Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

languages.text: 「うーん、その評価には賛成できません。セクター・ビオニカは、私の見解では、以前より良くなってきました。そして、船内が静かになることは、誰にとっても良いことでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

traits.locale_text: 「うーん、その評価には賛成できません。セクター・ビオニカは、私の見解では、以前より良くなってきました。そして、船内が静かになることは、誰にとっても良いことでしょう。」

languages.text: « Hmm… Je ne suis pas d'accord. À mes yeux, le secteur Bionica commence enfin à ressembler à une véritable infirmerie. Et qui serait contre un peu moins de vacarme à bord du vaisseau ? »
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

traits.locale_text: « Hmm… Je ne suis pas d'accord. À mes yeux, le secteur Bionica commence enfin à ressembler à une véritable infirmerie. Et qui serait contre un peu moins de vacarme à bord du vaisseau ? »

languages.text: "Hmm. Ich kann mich dieser Einschätzung nicht anschließen. Der Sektor Bionica ist meines Erachtens auf einem guten Weg. Und wer wäre gegen etwas mehr Ruhe auf dem Schiff?"
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

traits.locale_text: "Hmm. Ich kann mich dieser Einschätzung nicht anschließen. Der Sektor Bionica ist meines Erachtens auf einem guten Weg. Und wer wäre gegen etwas mehr Ruhe auf dem Schiff?"

languages.text: "Hım. Bu değerlendirmeye katılamam. Bence Sektör Biyonika daha iyi görünmeye başladı. Ayrıca gemide daha fazla sessizliğe kim hayır diyebilir?"
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

traits.locale_text: "Hım. Bu değerlendirmeye katılamam. Bence Sektör Biyonika daha iyi görünmeye başladı. Ayrıca gemide daha fazla sessizliğe kim hayır diyebilir?"

languages.text: «Hum. No coincido con esa afirmación. Como yo lo veo, el Sector Bionica empieza a tener el aspecto que debería. ¿Y a quién le va a molestar que la nave esté más silenciosa?».
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"

traits.locale_text: «Hum. No coincido con esa afirmación. Como yo lo veo, el Sector Bionica empieza a tener el aspecto que debería. ¿Y a quién le va a molestar que la nave esté más silenciosa?».

languages.text: “嗯，这番评价我可不敢苟同。在我看来，仿生区总算像点样了。再说，谁不想让舰船上清静些呢？”
languages.original_text: "Hmm. I cannot agree with that assessment. The Sector Bionica has started to look more up to snuff, in my view. And who would say no to more quiet on the ship?"
